profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk engages in the trading and transportation businesses in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Material sales, Expedition services, and Heavy equipment. The company also trades in cement, lime, sand, and stone, as well as transports and distributes cement, ground granulated blast furnace slag, fly ash, and bottom ash. In addition, it engages in motorized transportation for general and special goods, such as clinkers, coal, limestone, steel slag, stones, and bulk lime; car repairing activities; and retail trade-in car parts and accessories; and domestic port water sea, ocean, and sea freight activities for goods, as well as rents construction equipment. PT MPX Logistics International Tbk was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Bandar Lampung, Indonesia.
